offer: For construction contractors processing 5–10 projects/month, inefficient blueprint conversion causes project delays. We automate project management plan creation instead of manual project planning and management tools.
problem: Inefficient conversion of blueprints into actionable project plans.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for construction contractors
Indie Hackers posts on similar workflows
DM outreach to contractors with demo video
Community forums for sharing tools and advice
try_it: Let users try basic project timeline generation and task assignment on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post weekly progress updates in relevant communities
